title: Why frontier LLMs can't read the hard documents without experts involved
abstract: Isn't it funny to think that large language models (LLMs) can handle complex professional documents on their own? Think again! These models need experts involved to make sense of them. This tool is here to help you bypass those hurdles, saving you both time and effort in understanding tricky jargon-free style.
abstract_zh: 你是不是觉得大语言模型(LLM)也能轻松读懂那些复杂难啃的专业文档？别逗了，它们可没那么厉害！得请几位专家坐镇，才能让这些模型吃得消。这工具就是专门帮你解决这个问题的，让你省心省力，再也不用担心看不懂专业术语啦！
